description_long: This skateboard features a standard double-kick deck with a striking green and black graphic design on the underside, resembling swirling smoke or abstract flames. The deck has a classic popsicle shape with slightly rounded edges and a flat, wide surface. Four small, solid wheels are mounted beneath the deck, each attached to metal trucks that are partially visible from the side. The wheels and trucks are colored in a matching green tone, complementing the deck's artwork. The top of the deck is not visible, so the presence or pattern of grip tape cannot be confirmed. The overall build suggests a typical street skateboard suitable for tricks and urban riding.
description: A popsicle-shaped skateboard with green and black abstract graphics on the underside, green wheels, and matching trucks. The design is bold and urban, ideal for street use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, green wheels, and the abstract green and black deck graphic.
description_view_1: Narrow end view highlighting the width of the deck and the green-black graphic at the tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the same green wheels and deck artwork visible.
description_view_3: Narrow end view from the nose, showing the rounded shape and continuation of the green-black graphic.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The underside of the deck features an abstract, swirling green and black design reminiscent of smoke or flames, with no visible text or branding.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small and solid, colored green, no visible text or logos.
attribute_truck_style: Standard skateboard trucks, painted green to match the wheels, with no visible branding or unique features.
